project_feral.latest: Justin gave incredible walkthrough of architecture. Shift from manual to automation in testing, measuring, and learning. Building data pipeline analyzing years of marketing email content. Addressing PII concerns for business safety.
project_feral.ai_focus: Agentic tools to automate test-measure-learn cycle; customer behavior analysis; personalized communication strategies

netherlands_launch.latest: Priority: early onboarding with Blommers roastery as pilot. First end-to-end test during summit week (domestic product ordering, onboarding, fulfillment). NL only — not Belgium or Luxembourg. Language requirements being defined.
netherlands_launch.events: Amsterdam Coffee Festival activation with Blommers providing coffee, interactive Beanz quiz, Precision Brewer demos

finished_goods_shopify.latest: Integration testing with Kiss the Hippo (UK) as first connector over next ~2 weeks. Staged rollout: Coffee Bros (US), St Ali (AU), Fjord (DE). Target: 20 partners by July.
finished_goods_shopify.challenge: Manual processes causing issues, will be exacerbated by Shopify integration. Automation improvements planned for July.

platinum_roasters.latest: MaraX3 launch content being coordinated with Lelit. 6 US roasters signed. Content calendar Q1-Q4 defined. Ally pushing for more disciplined content strategy with clear KPIs.

content_calendar.q1: Brew Guides, Reels, Ask the Roaster, Seasonal Assets
content_calendar.q2: Barista Workflow, Single Origin vs Blends, Ask the Barista
content_calendar.q3: How is Decaf Made, Roastery Tour, How Did We Name This?
content_calendar.q4: Day in the Life, Evergreen B-roll, Summer recipes

platinum_roasters.gap: Need more defined content strategy — which channels, collaborative vs standalone, paid vs organic, exact formats/specs

woc_us.latest: Booth space negotiation ongoing. 5 objectives defined. Budget unclear — Beanz has no separate budget line, relies on Breville regional budgets.
woc_us.objectives: Brand visibility at specialty coffee trade show, Platinum Roaster showcasing, FTBP awareness

beanz_summit.focus: 5-year targets, homework involving AI capabilities, professional and recreational activities
action_items: Sophie to send agenda with homework
Team to craft customer questionnaire using Claude

power_bi_pl.latest: Building Beanz P&L Finance report in Power BI aligned with D365. Reconciling CommerceTools data with D365 revenue/COGS/freight. Mapping work between D365 data lake and CommerceTools ongoing.

key_data.challenge: Timing difference in revenue recognition between CommerceTools and D365

amsterdam_coffee_festival.note: Pre-launch for NL, Beanz quiz + Precision Brewer demos

woc_us.note: World of Coffee US — booth with Breville/Lelit/Baratza
